hard_invariants: No public benchmark prompts, tests, hidden tests, solutions, traces, or answer templates are admitted.
No open/base/pretrained model weights are used.
The corpus is for self-supervised pretraining only; public benchmarks remain calibration-only.

exclude: public benchmark tests and hidden tests
public benchmark solutions, traces, and answer templates
self-referential governance prose used only to pad token counts
include: Corben-owned/project-internal source needed for Theseus behavior
Permissively licensed English/code sources with manifest provenance
